::: {.tikz-descriptions}

::: {.tikz-desc data-node="sdata"}
**$x$ — Private data.** The sender's raw data, held privately and never shared.
:::

::: {.tikz-desc data-node="mech"}
**$M$ — Mechanism.** A (randomised) mechanism applied to the data $x$ to produce the output $T = M(x)$.
:::

::: {.tikz-desc data-node="sstat"}
**$T$ — Output.** The released statistic produced by the mechanism and shared with the receiver.
:::

::: {.tikz-desc data-node="strans"}
**$\mathfrak{C}$ — Guarantee.** The privacy guarantee / transcript accompanying the output.
:::

::: {.tikz-desc data-node="spriv"}
**$\rho$ — Privacy.** The privacy loss, derived from the data $x$ and the receiver's decision $d$.
:::

::: {.tikz-desc data-node="adata"}
**$Q$ — Data-prior.** The receiver's assumed prior over the data.
:::

::: {.tikz-desc data-node="apost"}
**$Q_T$ — Data-posterior.** The receiver's posterior given the shared output, $Q_T = Q(\,\cdot \mid T)$.
:::

::: {.tikz-desc data-node="aact"}
**$d$ — Decision.** The receiver's decision, formed from the posterior $Q_T$ and the loss $\ell$.
:::

::: {.tikz-desc data-node="aloss"}
**$\ell$ — Loss.** The receiver's assumed loss function.
:::

::: {.tikz-desc data-node="statbox"}
**Sender.** The sender subsystem: data $\to$ mechanism $\to$ output $\to$ guarantee $\to$ privacy.
:::

::: {.tikz-desc data-node="advbox"}
**Receiver.** The receiver subsystem: prior $\to$ posterior $\to$ decision, with assumed loss.
:::

:::
